translations.en: a man as large as the trees that surround his cottage.
translations.zh: 一位體型與環繞其小屋的大樹一樣高大的男子。

translations.en: "You're welcome here."
"Why you bargin' inta my house?" he shouts.
translations.zh: 「你為何闖入俺的屋裡？」他大吼道。

translations.en: Hefting his large axe, he prepares to defend his home.
translations.zh: 他掄起大斧，準備保衛自家。

translations.en: "Hah, sneakin' around in my @forest, huh?"
translations.zh: 「哈，在俺的@forest（森林）裡鬼鬼祟祟，嗯？」

translations.en: "I told the last one of ya that came by that I'll have nothin' t'do with yer @wars, so shove off!"
translations.zh: 「俺已告訴上一個來這裡的人：俺不想沾染汝們的@wars（戰事），滾開！」

translations.en: "I told ya once already that I want to be left @alone!"
translations.zh: 「俺已告訴過汝一次：俺要被@alone（獨自）留著！」

translations.en: "Hullo again, friend."
"Ben. My @friends call me Big Ben."
"But you ain't one of my friends."
"I guess you can call me 'Big Ben'." He smiles broadly.
translations.zh: 「吾想汝可以叫俺『大班』。」他咧嘴大笑。

translations.en: He fires a look at you. "I said only my @friends call me that."
translations.zh: 他瞪了汝一眼。「俺說了只有俺的@friends（朋友）才能這樣叫。」

translations.en: "'Tis my name. Don't wear it out." He laughs resoundingly at his wit.
translations.zh: 「那是俺的名字。別說壞了。」他為自己的妙語哈哈大笑。

translations.en: "It surprises you that I would have some."
"Sometimes it surprises me too." He laughs.
translations.zh: 「有時也讓俺自己吃驚。」他笑著說。

translations.en: "Have ya never seen a lumberman before?"
"Look around. Those stacks o' @wood don't cut themselves."
translations.zh: 「看看周圍。那些堆著的@wood（木材）不會自己砍自己。」

translations.en: "Aye, this is where I cut trees, and I don't like strangers wanderin' through!"
translations.zh: 「是的，俺在這裡伐樹，俺不喜歡外人到處亂逛！」

translations.en: "You're welcome here, though."
"Ever since I won that choppin' contest, the @king's had a notion I'd be good at wittlin' on men the same way."
translations.zh: 「自從俺在那次劈柴比賽中獲勝，@king（國王）上便有個念頭，以為俺對付人也會一樣厲害。」

translations.en: "Well, you can tell him I'm not interested."
"You are from the king, ain't ya?"
"Aye, are ya here to buy a log?"
"Careful in those woods now.
Accidents happen...."
"I spend too much time in these woods. Ask someone else."
translations.zh: 「俺在林子裡待太久了。去問別人吧。」

translations.en: "I knew it!"
"Oh." He seems friendlier now.
"Well, what do ya want then?"
"Well, come back sometime and I'll cut one for ya."
"Who wants it?"
"Well, why'd ya say you wanted one?"
"But $Y can't carry a log!"
"But $Y don't have 5 gold!"
"Logs is 5 gold apiece. Ya still want one?"
translations.zh: 「木頭每根 5 枚金幣。汝還要嗎？」

translations.en: $N takes $Y's gold and hands over a fine yew log.
translations.zh: $N 收下 $Y 的金幣，遞出一根上好的尤伊木。

translations.en: Ben seems friendlier now.
"Too pricey for ya, eh?"

translator_notes: 班（大班）是個粗獷的伐木工，不想被拉去打仗。用「俺」自稱，語氣直接帶點粗魯。尤伊木（yew log）是重要物品，保留「尤伊」地名特色。
